commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can align cron preflight with the existing provider request auth/header contract and add focused tests.; Needs attention: The diff is credential-sensitive and has one concrete header-placement concern before merge.; Review finding: [P2] Honor configured request auth in preflight — src/cron/isolated-agent/model-preflight.runtime.ts:233-236 (sha=769ead312d04c02d315c04b97ec3b737a54df877)
commands.review_summary:
The PR makes isolated cron local-provider preflight resolve provider auth, pass agent/workspace scope, and send a conditional Authorization bearer header with focused tests.

PR surface: Source +51, Tests +304. Total +355 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source plus copied live logs: current main and v2026.6.10 issue the local preflight GET without headers, and the PR body shows LiteLLM changing from 401 to 200 after the patch. I did not run a local LiteLLM instance in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can align cron preflight with the existing provider request auth/header contract and add focused tests.

target.title: fix(cron): add Authorization header to provider preflight probe
target.body:
## Summary

The cron job preflight check sends `GET {baseUrl}/models` to verify local provider connectivity before running a job, but was doing so **without an Authorization header**. For providers behind auth middleware (LiteLLM, vLLM, etc.), this generates spurious 401 errors on every cron run.

## Root Cause

`model-preflight.runtime.ts` -> `probeLocalProviderEndpoint()` called `fetchWithSsrFGuard` with `init: { method: "GET" }` - no auth header.

## Fix

Integrated `resolveApiKeyForProvider` from the shared SDK auth runtime (`plugin-sdk/provider-auth-runtime.ts`) for full credential chain resolution (config -> auth profiles -> env vars -> plugin hooks -> SecretRef) instead of sending probes without authentication.

### What changed

- `model-preflight.runtime.ts`: Added `resolveApiKeyForProvider` import; added `agentDir`/`workspaceDir` params; 2-tier auth: `request.auth.token` override -> `resolveApiKeyForProvider`; OAuth exclusion; auth leak protection via error redaction; added `isNonSecretApiKeyMarker` guard to prevent sentinel markers from being sent as Bearer tokens; guarded empty-string `request.auth.token` to prevent bare `Authorization: Bearer` header
- `run.ts`: Passes `agentDir` and `workspaceDir` to the preflight call
- `model-preflight.runtime.test.ts`: Expanded from 4 to 13 tests covering all auth paths + marker filtering

### Auth precedence

1. `request.auth.token` (explicit config override, `authorization-bearer` mode, non-empty after trim) - highest
2. `resolveApiKeyForProvider` - full credential chain from the shared SDK runtime (with `isNonSecretApiKeyMarker` guard)
3. No auth (OAuth tokens excluded; missing credentials non-fatal; sentinel markers like `custom-local`, `ollama-local`, env-var names filtered out)

### Security

- `Authorization: Bearer <key>` values are redacted from error messages via regex
- OAuth tokens are never sent to reachability probes
- SSRF protection via hostname allowlist + private network scoping
- Non-secret sentinel markers (`custom-local`, `ollama-local`, `secretref-managed`, env-var name references, etc.) are never sent as Bearer tokens
- Empty-string or whitespace-only `request.auth.token` values fall through to the credential chain (prevents bare `Authorization: Bearer` header)

## CI Status

Rebased to latest upstream/main. All CI failures are pre-existing flakes in unrelated test areas (resolve-openclaw-ref GITHUB_OUTPUT env var issue, test-projects stale file list). None caused by the PR changes.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior or issue addressed:** Cron job preflight GET /models to local LiteLLM proxy returns 401 because no Authorization header is sent, causing "No api key passed in" errors on every cron run. Normal inference calls (POST /chat/completions) succeed because they carry the Authorization header — only the preflight probe was missing it.

**Real environment tested:**
- **OS:** Ubuntu 24.04 (Oracle VPS)
- **Runtime:** Node.js v24.15.0
- **OpenClaw version:** 2026.5.18 (npm install)
- **Provider:** LiteLLM proxy at http://127.0.0.1:4000
- **Auth method:** LITELLM_API_KEY environment variable

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**
```bash
# 1. Apply the patch to the running OpenClaw installation
cp dist/model-preflight.runtime-*.js /path/to/openclaw/dist/

# 2. Wait for the next scheduled cron job to trigger the preflight probe

# 3. Monitor LiteLLM proxy logs
pm2 logs litellm-proxy

# 4. Monitor OpenClaw gateway logs for cron job execution
pm2 logs openclaw-gateway
```

**Evidence after fix:**
Terminal capture of LiteLLM proxy logs before and after the patch:

Before (top) — no auth header, cron preflight triggers 401:
```text
17:30:05 LiteLLM Proxy:ERROR - Exception occured - No api key passed in.
Requester IP Address:127.0.0.1
127.0.0.1:58244 - "GET /models HTTP/1.1" 401 Unauthorized
127.0.0.1:50768 - "POST /chat/completions HTTP/1.1" 200 OK
```

After (bottom) — auth header sent, preflight succeeds:
```text
127.0.0.1:45914 - "GET /models HTTP/1.1" 200 OK
127.0.0.1:49934 - "POST /chat/completions HTTP/1.1" 200 OK
```

Screenshot: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/samson1357924/openclaw/fix/cron-preflight-clean/evidence-preflight-fix.jpg

**Observed result after fix:** GET /models response changed from 401 Unauthorized to 200 OK. No more "No api key passed in" errors in LiteLLM proxy logs. Cron preflight cache populates correctly. Normal inference calls continue to work as before — unchanged.

**What was not tested:**
- Non-default cron agent directories
- SecretRef-based auth
- Authless providers like Ollama (should be unaffected)
- OAuth/request-header auth profiles
- Bundled plugin marker filtering (covered by isNonSecretApiKeyMarker unit tests)

## Changes

5 files changed (+426/-6):
- `src/cron/isolated-agent/model-preflight.runtime.ts` - auth refactor + marker filter + empty-string guard
- `src/cron/isolated-agent/run.ts` - scope passthrough
- `src/cron/isolated-agent/model-preflight.runtime.test.ts` - 13 tests (auth + markers)
- `evidence-preflight-fix.jpg` - before/after terminal comparison

Closes #83648
